## Definition of Done

See `QUALITY.md` §2.

- [ ] Lint + type-check pass locally
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated; coverage ≥ 80% on new code
- [ ] Integration tests if DB / external APIs touched
- [ ] **RLS test** if DB schema changed (multi-tenant isolation)
- [ ] **PHI handling** reviewed if patient data touched
- [ ] AI output validated if Gemini calls modified
- [ ] `README.md` / `CONVENTIONS.md` / ADR updated where relevant
- [ ] Screenshot / recording attached for UI changes
